ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the penguin species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "islands" (
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each island */,
  "island_name" TEXT /* Name of the island */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the island */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the island */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the island */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the island in square kilometers */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the island */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("island_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* ID of the island */,
  "bill_length_mm" REAL /* Length of the penguin's bill in millimeters */,
  "bill_depth_mm" REAL /* Depth of the penguin's bill in millimeters */,
  "flipper_length_mm" INTEGER /* Length of the penguin's flipper in millimeters */,
  "body_mass_g" INTEGER /* Body mass of the penguin in grams */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the penguin (male or female) */,
  "age_years" INTEGER /* Age of the penguin in years */,
  "age_months" INTEGER /* Age of the penguin in months */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the penguin */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations made during the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_island_id FOREIGN KEY ("island_id") REFERENCES islands ("island_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Research specialization of the researcher */,
  "year_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in penguin research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the data */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* ID of the island where the data was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the data collection event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the data collection event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the data collection event */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of researchers in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_island_id FOREIGN KEY ("island_id") REFERENCES islands ("island_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_collection" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection event */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* ID of the sensor used, if applicable */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the collected data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_island" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* ID of the island */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the species on the island */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last population survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id", "island_id")
)
